info.description: SwiftFiat Backend API for cryptocurrency and fiat transactions
info.title: SwiftFiat API

post.description: Adds a specified amount to a user's wallet balance. This endpoint is intended for administrative use only.
Creates or updates the fee structure for a specific transaction type.

get.description: Retrieve the count of active users for a specific date. Accessible only by admin, super admin, or customer rep.
Retrieve activity logs for a specific user by their ID. Accessible only by admin, super admin, or customer rep.
get.summary: Get Activity Logs for a User

get.description: Retrieve recent activity logs. Accessible only by admin, super admin, or customer rep.

delete.description: Delete activity logs older than a certain threshold. Accessible only by admin.

get.description: Retrieve all crypto transactions. Accessible only by admin.
Retrieve total sent and received crypto transaction amounts. Accessible only by admin.
Retrieve counts of crypto transactions by status. Accessible only by admin.

put.description: Admin can edit user details such as first name, last name, email, phone number, and role.

get.description: Retrieve all gift cards. Accessible only by admin.
Retrieve all gift card transactions. Accessible only by admin.
Retrieve total received amount. Accessible only by admin.
Retrieve total sent amount. Accessible only by admin.
Retrieve total sent amount. Accessible only by admin.
Retrieve all transactions with user details. Accessible only by admin.
Retrieve wallets for a specific user by their ID. Accessible only by admin.

post.description: Change the authenticated user's password
Create a new passcode for the authenticated user
Create a new transaction pin for the authenticated user
Initiate passcode reset process by sending an OTP to the user's email
Initiate password reset process by sending an OTP to the user's email

Authenticate user with email and password
If 2FA is enabled, a temporary token will be returned for 2FA verification, if its a new device or no active session
If user is admin, an OTP will be sent to email for verification
Authenticate user with email and passcode
Logs the user out by deleting their active session
Logs the user out from all devices by deleting all active sessions

get.description: Get the authenticated user's profile information

post.description: Register a new user account
Register a new admin account. Requires a valid admin key.
Sends a new email verification code to the user's email address
Reset user's password using the provided OTP and new password
Reset user's password using the provided OTP and new password
Sends a One-Time Password (OTP) to the specified phone number using Twilio

Enable or disable two-factor authentication for the authenticated user
When enabling 2FA, an OTPAuthURL and Secret will be returned for setting up the authenticator app

get.description: Test endpoint to verify authentication API is working

post.description: Update the authenticated user's transaction pin

Verify the provided 2FA code for the authenticated user
On successful verification, a main session token will be issued
Verify OTP for admin login
Verifies a user's email address using a verification code sent to their email
Verifies a One-Time Password (OTP) sent to the specified phone number using Twilio

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific cryptocurrency coin using the CoinRanking provider.
Retrieves historical price data for a specific cryptocurrency coin over a defined time period using the CoinRanking provider.

post.description:
Creates a stablecoin funding address for the authenticated user using the Cryptomus provider.
Supported stablecoins are USDT and USDC.
Creates a static cryptocurrency wallet for the authenticated user using the Cryptomus provider.

get.description: Retrieves a list of image filenames from the assets directory.

post.description: Retrieves payment information for a specific order using the Cryptomus provider.
Generates a QR code for a specified wallet UUID using the Cryptomus provider.
Resends a previously sent webhook notification using the Cryptomus provider.

get.description: Retrieves a list of available cryptocurrency services from the Cryptomus provider.

post.description: Tests if the Crypto API is active and reachable
Triggers a test webhook to verify the Cryptomus webhook endpoint functionality.

get.description: Retrieves the referral earnings for the authenticated user
Retrieves the list of referrals for the authenticated user
Tests if the Referral API is active

post.description: Tracks a referral using the provided referral code
Retrieves the referral earnings for the authenticated user

get.description: Retrieves the referral earnings for the authenticated user
Retrieves the referral earnings for the authenticated user

put.description: Update the authenticated user's avatar image

post.description: Check if a user tag is available for use

delete.description: Delete a user by ID (admin only)

post.description: Set or update the authenticated user's FreshChat ID

get.description: Retrieve a list of users who registered today (admin only)

post.description: Send a test push notification to the provided FCM or Expo token

get.description: Retrieve user details by ID (admin only)

post.description: Retrieve the user ID based on the provided encrypted ID

get.description: Retrieve a list of all KYC submissions (admin only)
Retrieve a paginated list of users (admin only)

delete.description: Delete a specific notification for the authenticated user

put.description: Mark a specific notification as read for the authenticated user

get.description: Retrieve the notifications for the authenticated user
Count the total number of notifications for the authenticated user
Count the number of unread notifications for the authenticated user

delete.description: Delete all notifications for the authenticated user
Delete all read notifications for the authenticated user

put.description: Mark all notifications as read for the authenticated user
Update the authenticated user's phone number using OTP verification

get.description: Get the authenticated user's profile information

post.description: Add or update the authenticated user's push notification token (FCM or Expo)

get.description: Retrieve the referral information for the authenticated user

put.description: Update the authenticated user's first and last name
Activate or deactivate a user by ID (admin only)

post.description: Set or update the authenticated user's tag

get.description: Retrieve the avatar image for a specified user
Retrieves the wallets associated with the authenticated user.
Retrieves a list of supported banks for fiat transactions. Can be filtered using a query parameter.
Retrieves the list of saved beneficiaries for the authenticated user.
Validates and retrieves bank account details using account number and bank code.
Resolves a user tag to retrieve associated wallet information for a specific currency.

post.description: Performs a currency swap between user's wallets. This endpoint handles currency conversion between supported currencies.

get.description: Retrieves the fee structure for a specific transaction type.
Retrieves the transactions associated with the authenticated user's wallets.

parameters.description: Number of transactions to retrieve per page
parameters.name: page_limit

get.description: Retrieves the transactions associated with the authenticated user's wallets using cursor-based pagination.

get.description: Retrieves a specific transaction associated with the authenticated user's wallet.

post.description: Performs a transfer between user wallets. This endpoint handles internal transfers between users' wallets.
Executes a fiat currency transfer to a bank account.

otp_auth_url.description: OTPAuthURL is the URL used to generate the QR code for 2FA setup

secret.description: Secret is the secret key used for generating TOTP codes

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
